sentences.target: Der Passagier steigt am Bahnhof aus.

translations.de: Der Passagier steigt am Bahnhof aus.
translations.en: The passenger gets off at the station.
translations.es: El pasajero se baja en la estación.
translations.fr: Le passager descend à la gare.
translations.nl: De passagier stapt uit op het station.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determinates the subject noun 'Passagier'.
Common noun, masculine; nominative singular functioning as the sentence subject.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular, present tense; forms a separable verb with the particle 'aus' (aussteigen = to get off).
Contraction of the preposition 'an' + article 'dem'; introduces a dative locative phrase.
Common noun; dative singular as the complement of 'am', indicating location.
Separable verb particle; completes the verb 'steigt' to form 'aussteigen' (to get off).

sentences.target: Ich frage den Passagier nach seinem Ticket.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn pasaˈʒiːɐ̯ naːx ˈzaɪ̯nəm ˈtɪkɛt/

translations.de: Ich frage den Passagier nach seinem Ticket.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn pasaˈʒiːɐ̯ naːx ˈzaɪ̯nəm ˈtɪkɛt/
translations.en: I ask the passenger for his ticket.
translations.es: Le pido al pasajero su billete.
translations.fr: Je demande au passager son billet.
translations.it: Chiedo al passeggero il suo biglietto.
translations.pt: Peço ao passageiro o bilhete dele.
translations.he: אני מבקש מהנוסע את הכרטיס שלו.
translations.vi: Tôi yêu cầu hành khách đưa vé.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de passagier om zijn kaartje.
translations.hu: Megkérem az utact, hogy mutassa a jegyét.
translations.hi: मैं यात्री से उसका टिकट माँगता हूँ.
translations.el: Ζητάω από τον επιβάτη το εισιτήριό του.
translations.nb: Jeg ber passasjeren om billetten hans.
translations.sv: Jag ber passageraren om hans biljett.
translations.da: Jeg beder passageren om hans billet.
translations.ja: 乗客に切符を見せてもらいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular, present tense; takes an accusative object ('den Passagier') and a prepositional object ('nach ...').
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; marks 'Passagier' as the direct object.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as the direct object of 'frage'.
Preposition governing the dative; in the construction 'nach etwas fragen' meaning 'to ask about', introduces a dative complement.
Possessive determiner, dative singular (agreeing with neuter noun 'Ticket'); marks possession.
Common noun, neuter; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Neben mir sitzt ein Passagier am Fenster.
sentences.reading: /ˈneːbən miːɐ̯ zɪtst aɪ̯n pasaˈʒiːɐ̯ am ˈfɛnstɐ/

translations.de: Neben mir sitzt ein Passagier am Fenster.
translations.ipa: /ˈneːbən miːɐ̯ zɪtst aɪ̯n pasaˈʒiːɐ̯ am ˈfɛnstɐ/
translations.en: Next to me, a passenger sits by the window.
translations.es: A mi lado, un pasajero está sentado junto a la ventana.
translations.fr: À côté de moi, un passager est assis près de la fenêtre.
translations.it: Accanto a me, un passeggero è seduto vicino al finestrino.
translations.ko: 내 옆에는 창가에 앉은 승객이 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我旁边有位乘客坐在窗边。
translations.yue: 我旁邊有個乘客坐喺窗邊。
translations.ru: Рядом со мной у окна сидит пассажир.
translations.pt: Ao meu lado, um passageiro está sentado à janela.
translations.tr: Yanımda, cam kenarında bir yolcu oturuyor.
translations.vi: Bên cạnh tôi có một hành khách ngồi cạnh cửa sổ.
translations.nl: Naast mij zit een passagier bij het raam.
translations.uk: Поруч зі мною біля вікна сидить пасажир.
translations.hu: Mellettem egy utas ül az ablaknál.
translations.hi: मेरे पास खिड़की के पास एक यात्री बैठा है.
translations.pl: Obok mnie przy oknie siedzi pasażep.
translations.el: Δίπλα μου κάθεται ένας επιβάτης στο παράθυρο.
translations.nb: Ved siden av meg sitter en passasjer ved vinduet.
translations.id: Di sebelah saya, seorang penumpang duduk di dekat jendela.
translations.sv: Bredvid mig sitter en passagerare vid fönstret.
translations.ro: Lângă mine stă un pasager la geam.
translations.cs: Vedle mě u okna sedí cestující.
translations.da: Ved siden af mig sidder en passager ved vinduet.
translations.ja: 私の隣には窓側に座っている乗客がいます。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; here indicating location and governing the dative ('mir').
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, dative; complement of the preposition 'Neben'.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular, present tense; main predicate of the clause.
Indefinite article, nominative masculine singular; introduces the subject noun 'Passagier' in post-verbal position.
Common noun, masculine; nominative singular functioning as the subject.
Contraction of 'an' + 'dem'; introduces a dative prepositional phrase indicating location.
Common noun, neuter; dative singular as complement of 'am', expressing location.

sentences.target: Im Bus steht ein Passagier auf.

translations.de: Im Bus steht ein Passagier auf.
translations.en: In the bus, a passenger stands up.
translations.es: En el autobús, un pasajero se levanta.
translations.fr: Dans le bus, un passager se lève.
translations.it: In autobus, un passeggero si alza.
translations.zh-Hans: 在公交车上，一位乘客站了起来。
translations.yue: 喺巴士上有個乘客企起身。
translations.vi: Trên xe buýt, một hành khách đứng lên.
translations.nl: In de bus staat een passagier op.
translations.hi: बस में एक यात्री खड़ा होता है.
translations.nb: På bussen reiser en passasjer seg.
translations.id: Di dalam bus, seorang penumpang berdiri.
translations.sv: På bussen reser sig en passagerare.
translations.ro: În autobuz, un pasager se ridică.
translations.da: I bussen rejser en passager sig.
translations.ja: バスの中で乗客が立ち上がります。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of the preposition 'in' + article 'dem'; introduces a dative locative phrase.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as the complement of 'Im', indicating location.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular, present tense; forms a separable verb with 'auf' (aufstehen = to stand up).
Indefinite article, nominative masculine singular; introduces the subject noun 'Passagier' in post-verbal position.
Common noun, masculine; nominative singular functioning as the subject.
Separable verb particle; completes the verb 'steht' to form 'aufstehen' (to stand up).
